chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 170 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.487/2022 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of main case 06.11.2023 None present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
